title: Vannilla is Yummy
description: Making Vannilla the Best it can possibly be with client side only mods (you can play this on any server)
body:
Ever Felt Vannila Minecraft is missing something? Like Vannilla+ Mods but are annoyed by not being able to play on servers with them? in both cases, this modpack is for YOU!

It Adds 71 Mods that make Minecraft just Better while not ruining FPS, Lag or your ability to play on servers, this pack has been completly tested and it works just fine!

if you play with shaders and your fps drop you may have to change your shader settings to a lower quality.
